supplies.title: White and Colored Chalk
supplies.rationale:
Crayola chalk is best. Other brands tend to be less intense and full of binder that scratches the board. 

- Art and Picture Study: Used throughout art lessons and picture study for memory drawings.
- Playground Games: Used in playground games to mark the ground for hopscotch, four squares, and other games.
- Lettering: Used for chalk lettering projects.
supplies.usedInText:
Art
Picture Study
Lettering: Levels 1-2
Playground Games
programList: Used across the curriculum in 3 or more subjects.

supplies.title: Hula Hoops
supplies.maySub: any open circle such as an embroidery hoop or a mason jar top ring for Art or any hula hoops or other items that can be used as large circles on the ground for P.E.
supplies.usedInText:
Art: Level 2
Art: Level 3
Playground Games
Sports

supplies.title: Cones, Bean Bags, and Rings Set
supplies.rationale: Cones and rings are used for marking areas. Bean bags are used in different tagging games and for tossing/throwing.
supplies.maySub: any bean bags, cones, rings, or other items for marking areas.

supplies.title: Long Jump Rope and Short Jump Rope
supplies.rationale: Used for P.E. lessons that have jump rope activities.
supplies.note: You need a 16 ft and a 7 ft jump rope. The link is for two 16 ft jumps that can be easily adjusted to any length. Optional Grades 7-12.
supplies.maySub: any long and short jump rope.
supplies.qty: 1 long per 6 students, 1 short per student

supplies.title: Dumbbell Hand Weight Sets of 2 (1-3 pounds)
supplies.rationale: Used for doing exercises from the book 303 Tween-Approved Exercises and Active Games.
supplies.maySub: with other weights or can even use cans.

supplies.title: Exercise Ball
supplies.rationale: Used for doing exercises from the book 303 Tween-Approved Exercises and Active Games.
supplies.maySub: with any ball of a similar size.

supplies.title: Exercise Mat
supplies.rationale: Used for doing circuit training exercises from the book 303 Tween-Approved Exercises and Active Games.
supplies.maySub: with any mat or not needed if you have carpet.
